[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010000011 3
1 111010010 5
2 001001111 5
3 001100101 4
4 100000101 3
5 101110100 5
6 011011001 5
7 111010011 6

01 10 101000000 2
12 21 110001010 4
23 32 010011010 4
34 43 010001010 3
45 54 000000010 1
56 65 100100100 3
67 76 001011000 3
70 07 001010000 2

02 20 100010000 2
13 31 011101010 5
24 42 010001010 3
35 53 000100010 2
46 64 000001000 1
57 75 000000010 1
60 06 101010000 3
71 17 001001010 3

03 30 001010000 2
14 41 010001010 3
25 52 100000010 2
36 63 001111000 4
47 74 000001010 2
50 05 100000000 1
61 16 101101000 4
72 27 000011010 3

04 40 000000001 1
15 51 100100010 3
26 62 100011000 3
37 73 001011010 4
